source_system.description: Originating tracker: 'github_issues', 'jira', 'linear', or 'none' for internally-motivated engineering tasks.

issue_id.description: Tracker issue ID (e.g. 'GH-142'). Null when source_system is 'none'.

acceptance_criteria.description: Human-readable acceptance criteria. check-plan performs keyword overlap check against plan text fields.

raw_context_tokens.description: Key technical terms from the requirement used for lightweight plan alignment checks.

human_approval.description: Required when source_system is 'none'. Null is valid for externally-sourced snapshots whose provenance is the external tracker's IdP/RBAC.
